creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
my patches have nothing to do with this.

This error involves iconv.

You said the system is "new" but what about the dependencies?  Did you build them yourself or did you install via package?  Is the aegis package available?  (if so, why are you building it?)

If I start a poudriere build and it completes, then this is a local issue involving libiconv.
